$comment: Reusable controls bundle for section blocks that query a CPT. Copy these into your block.fields.json controls[] array. Pair with GCBLite\Blocks\Queries\Collection::query() in your render.php — see AGENTS.md.

controls.$comment: Set `postType` on the post-object control to the CPT slug your block queries (e.g. 'project').
controls.label: Pick posts
